description: Trigger ElastiCache replication group failover via TestFailover API to validate primary-replica role swap and connection recovery

triggerReplicationGroupFailover.description: Trigger ElastiCache TestFailover and wait for replication group to return to available

parameters.documentParameters: {"ReplicationGroupId": "<YOUR REPLICATION GROUP ID>", "NodeGroupId": "0001", "AutomationAssumeRole": "arn:aws:iam::<YOUR AWS ACCOUNT>:role/<YOUR SSM ROLE NAME>"}
